html:
Exclusive to:
This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift

Research Notes are an Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in From Beyond. When studying it, a page in the Scrapbook written by Grainy Transmission is added. Different Research Notes adds to Scrapbook as different items.

Notes of "Day 56" spawns along with the first set of Abandoned Junk structures a player encounters. When studying it, a page in the Scrapbook written by Wagstaff is added, listing all Mobs suspected to be viable hosts for the Incursive Gestalts.

Notes of "Day 89", "Day 195", "Day 226", "Day 354", "Day 418" will be dropped from Grainy Transmission after giving him Phasmo-Encapsulators with gestalts during W.A.R.B.O.T. Quest after the player places all 76 Substrate Extrapolators.

Day Notes
56 "Day 56 - Lunar Mutations Study"
"It seems as though these strange entities that emerged from the rifts are in search of living hosts... or perhaps once living.
"NOTE: The following creatures warrant immediate study as I suspect they may be the most viable as hosts:"
*Frog
*Pengull
*Varg
*Koalefant
*Deerclops
"Other possible Rift entity host candidates:"
*Grass Gekko
*Hound
*Bearger
*Mosling
89 "Day 89 - Material Study"
"Thulecite appears sufficient to contain lunar entities. Structural integrity holds under moderate strain. Further testing advised."
195 "Day 195 - Energy"
"Eureka. Lunar forms radiate boundless energy. Containable. Obedient, even? Control may be possible. Endless applications... if stability holds."
226 "Day 226 - Containment Measures"
"Area of containment necessary prior to experimentation. Consider implementing a kinetic and teleportational dampening field?"
354 "Day 354 - Heat Signature Detection"
"Preliminary thermal tracking functional. However, response irregularities suggest vulnerability to rudimentary interference - false positives observed with minimal thermal masking."
418 "Day 418 - Electrifying!"
"Interesting. Can redirect controlled electric discharge for practical (and offensive) applications. Truly remarkable potential. Note to self: don appropriate insulative layers next time. That last zap was... unexpectedly exhilarating."

Trivia

  • Research Notes were introduced in the Host of Horrors update.
  • As of the Host of Horrors update, a few of the creatures listed do not have lunar mutations:
    • Koalefant
    • Grass Gekko
    • Mosling
  • The Hound and the Pengull have mutations (Horror Hound and Permafrost Pengull) that were present before Lunar Rifts were introduced.

Gallery

  • Research Notes Dropped

Research Notes
Object Info
15 sec.
Miscellaneous
"wagstaff_mutations_note"

Exclusive to:
This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift
“Fascinating! Illuminating! Brain-embiggening!”
–Wilson
“Looks important. I'll burn it later.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang has no interest in old man scribblemarks.”
–Wolfgang
“Somebody's last words?”
–Wendy
“WHAT IS THIS BABBLE. MAYBE THE OLD MAN HAS FINALLY LOST IT”
–WX-78
“I have a bad feeling about what is written here.”
–Wickerbottom
“Can't make heads or tails of it myself, but it seems important.”
–Woodie
“What have we here? More of that lunacy?”
–Maxwell
“Save it för the schölars!”
–Wigfrid
“Is it a story?”
–Webber
“Zut alors! I thought it would be a recipe!”
–Warly
“Book leaf?”
–Wormwood
“Some interestin' theories here...”
–Winona
“The writings of a visionary, or the ravings of a madman? Who's to say!”
–Wortox
“Moo-tay-shuns... studdy? Glurgh, this one really hard!”
–Wurt
“These notes contain important clues to a mystery, Woby.”
–Walter
“Someone must have a lot of time on their hands.”
–Wanda

Trivia[edit | edit source]
Research Notes were introduced in the Host of Horrors update.
As of the Host of Horrors update, a few of the creatures listed do not have lunar mutations:
Koalefant
Grass Gekko
Mosling
The Hound and the Pengull have mutations (Horror Hound and Permafrost Pengull) that were present before Lunar Rifts were introduced.
